MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Steinhart Hotel is present. Represented by Demitar Stanuv.
Attorney, Edward Singer, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Cynthia Stilz, is present.
Attorney, Pauline Farmer-Koppenol , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Comissioner Hewlett, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 612, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-13-2010 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CYNTHIA ANN STILTZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS TO ANSWER; THE PRIOR CASE WAS DISMISSED ON AUGUST 2, 2010. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
